files.src/App.css: :root{color-scheme:dark}*{box-sizing:border-box}html,body{margin:0;min-height:100%;background:#020617}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.app{min-height:100vh;display:grid;place-items:center;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb;padding:24px}.layout{width:min(100%,980px);display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));align-items:start;gap:16px}.column{min-width:0;background:#020617;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #1f2937;padding:16px;display:grid;gap:12px}.title{margin:0;font-size:18px;font-weight:700}.subtitle{margin:4px 0 0;font-size:13px;color:#9ca3af}.product-list,.cart-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:grid;gap:8px}.product-card,.cart-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #1f2937;background:#020617}.product-main,.cart-info{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:3px}.product-name,.cart-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;overflow-wrap:anywhere}.product-price{font-size:13px;color:#a3e635}.stock-count{font-size:12px;color:#94a3b8}.cart-header{display:grid;gap:4px}.cart-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:12px;color:#9ca3af}.unit-price,.line-total,.subtotal,.discount,.grand-total{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.times,.equals{opacity:.7}.cart-actions{display:flex;gap:6px}button{border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #374151;background:#020617;color:#e5e7eb;padding:7px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}button:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:#a3e635}button:focus-visible,input:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #facc15;outline-offset:2px}button:disabled{cursor:not-allowed;opacity:.45}button.ghost{background:transparent}button.danger{border-color:#f97316;color:#f97316}.empty,.cart-status,.promo-feedback,.checkout-status{min-height:18px;margin:0;font-size:13px;color:#94a3b8}.cart-status,.promo-feedback,.checkout-status{overflow-wrap:anywhere}.promo-form{display:grid;gap:7px}.promo-form label{font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.promo-controls{display:flex;gap:8px}.promo-input{min-width:0;flex:1;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:10px;background:#0f172a;color:#f8fafc;padding:9px 11px}.apply-promo,.checkout-button{background:#365314;border-color:#65a30d;color:#ecfccb}.summary{display:grid;gap:6px;margin:0;padding:12px;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:12px}.summary div{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px}.summary dt,.summary dd{margin:0}.summary dt{color:#94a3b8}.summary div:last-child{font-weight:800}.discount{color:#bef264}.checkout-button{width:100%;border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px}@media(max-width:760px){.app{padding:14px}.layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}.product-card,.cart-row{align-items:flex-start}.cart-row{flex-direction:column}.cart-actions{width:100%;justify-content:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap}}@media(max-width:420px){.product-card{align-items:stretch;flex-direction:column}.promo-controls{align-items:stretch;flex-direction:column}}
